_title: Must be Ragnarock with two spaces after it, that's how it was written
_pixels: Exactly 4, 5, or 6 [x, y] positions in window-relative coordinates.
Pixels 1-4 (index 0-3): drum lane pixels, left to right:
pixel 2 = LeftMid drum   =  key W or I (auto-selected)
pixel 3 = RightMid drum  = key O or E (auto-selected)
Use find_coords.py to find the right coordinates.
_color_tolerances: Green trigger: G >= green_g_min, R <= green_rb_max, B <= green_rb_max.
Yellow/Cyan: classified by HSV hue range. Adjust if detection is unreliable.
_timing: poll_interval_ms: how often pixels are sampled (ms). 16 to 60 Hz.
key_hold_ms: how long each key is held down.
cooldown_ms: minimum gap before the same chord can fire again.
rapid_sequence_gap_ms: delay between individual notes when firing a meme-map
(3-4 note) pattern in rapid succession. Lower = faster burst.
_window_relative: If true, pixel coords are relative to the game window's top-left client corner. Recommended.
